gates.name: Gate A
gates.label: North Entry
gates.description: Main north entrance, nearest to parking lots P1–P3 and Stadium Station (Blue Line).

gates.name: Gate B
gates.label: East Entry
gates.description: East entrance, closest to drop-off zone and Route 42 bus stop.

gates.name: Gate C
gates.label: South Entry
gates.description: South entrance. Steps only — not wheelchair accessible. Use Gate A or B for accessibility needs.

gates.name: Gate D
gates.label: West Entry
gates.description: West entrance with rideshare/taxi pickup zone in Lot C immediately outside.

gates.name: Gate E
gates.label: VIP / Media Entry
gates.description: Reserved for credentialed media and VIP ticket holders. Accessible route available.

facilities.name: Restroom Block A
facilities.description: Accessible restrooms with family room. Located 30 m inside Gate A.

facilities.name: Restroom Block B
facilities.description: Accessible restrooms near section 114–118. Located 20 m inside Gate B.

facilities.name: Restroom Block C
facilities.description: Standard restrooms near south concourse. Not wheelchair accessible.

facilities.name: Sensory Room
facilities.description: Quiet sensory room for guests with sensory processing needs. Low lighting, noise-reduced. Open all match hours. Capacity 10.

facilities.name: First Aid Station A
facilities.description: Primary first aid post staffed by paramedics. Open from gates-open to 30 min post-match.

facilities.name: First Aid Station B
facilities.description: Secondary first aid post. Located near south concourse.

facilities.name: Concession Stand — North Plaza
facilities.description: Full-service food and beverage. Includes halal and vegetarian options. Accepts card and contactless.

facilities.name: Concession Stand — South Concourse
facilities.description: Quick-service snacks and beverages. Accepts card and contactless.

facilities.name: Recycling Station — East Plaza
facilities.description: Sorted recycling bins: plastics, cans, paper. Part of the FIFA 2026 Zero-Waste initiative.

transitOptions.note: Add 30 min buffer post-match for platform crowd.
Express service runs 90 min before and after kick-off.
Free shuttle between Stadium Station and remote parking lots P1–P3.
Designated pickup and drop-off only. Follow in-app pin labeled 'Legacy Stadium – Lot C'. No curbside pickup.

sustainabilityPoints.name: Recycling Station — North Plaza
sustainabilityPoints.description: Sorted recycling bins at the main north entrance. Plastic, glass, and mixed recycling.

sustainabilityPoints.name: Recycling Station — East Plaza
sustainabilityPoints.description: Sorted recycling bins near Gate B. Part of the FIFA 2026 Zero-Waste initiative.

sustainabilityPoints.name: Refill Station — North Concourse
sustainabilityPoints.description: Free water refill point. Bring a reusable bottle to help reduce single-use plastic. Chilled water available.
